productDisplayName: Converse Unisex All Star Canvas Ox Red Shoe
description: CompositionRed unisex shoes made with canvas uppers and rubber outsolesshoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm waterThese fiery red shoes from converse come in a classic design with durable canvas uppers, canvas lining and a cushioned footbed for hours of uniterrupted comfort. The lace-up front with metallic eyelets ensures a snug Fit while the original rubber toe box and toe guard give added protection. The multi directional outsole gives added grip. The red colour adds a great burst of energy. Perfect for skateboarding and other urban activities.
